translations.Optionally specify an alternative olvid: Optionally specify an alternative olvid distribution server to use
translations.Optional api key used to generate Olvid+: Optional api key used to generate Olvid+ licenses for users
translations.Are you sure you want to delete {name}?: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
translations.If you do not have Olvid yet, download i: If you do not have Olvid yet, download it first:
translations.Choose how you will appear to other Olvi: Choose how you will appear to other Olvid users. At least a first name or last name is required.
translations.Waiting for you to complete enrollment i: Waiting for you to complete enrollment in the app…
translations.Your Olvid identity is now linked to you: Your Olvid identity is now linked to your Nextcloud account. You will appear in the Olvid directory and can join group discussions.
translations.I no longer have access to my Olvid prof: I no longer have access to my Olvid profile
translations.This will disconnect your Olvid profile: This will disconnect your Olvid profile from this directory and allow you to register a new one.
translations.My Olvid profile was lost or replaced: My Olvid profile was lost or replaced
Warning: this action is not reversible. Your Olvid identity will be blocked for every other contact in this directory. They will no longer be able to reach you through this identity, and it can never be re-registered. You will need to create a new Olvid profile and re-enroll.
translations.At least a first name or last name is re: At least a first name or last name is required.
translations.Open the Olvid app, then scan this QR co: Open the Olvid app, then scan this QR code to link your account:
translations.If Olvid is installed on this computer,: If Olvid is installed on this computer, click the button below to open it directly:
translations.You can also copy the link and paste it: You can also copy the link and paste it in Olvid manually.
